title: LPC Unveils New Historic District Markers Commemorating the Central Harlem – West 130th-132nd Streets Historic District
content: Landmarks Preservation Commission311Search all NYC.gov websitesMenuText-SizeSearchHomeAboutDesignationsApplicationsHearingsViolationsDiscoverSearchSearchLPC Unveils New Historic District Markers Commemorating the Central Harlem – West 130th-132nd Streets Historic DistrictLearn MoreLPC joined State Senator Cleare, Assemblymember Wright, Councilmember Salaam, NYLPF, Manhattan Community Board 10, and Save Harlem Now! to unveil new markers commemorating Central Harlem – West 130th-132nd Streets Historic District.LPC Advanced Key Initiatives in 2025Learn MoreLPC released a list of agency accomplishments, including key initiatives to support economic growth, housing creation, and improve efficiency, transparency, and accessibility of agency processes.LPC Designates Two New Historic Districts in BrooklynLearn MoreToday, LPC voted to designate two new historic districts in Flatbush: Beverley Square West Historic District and Ditmas Park West Historic District.Commemorating Addisleigh Park Historic District in QueensLearn MoreLPC joined State Senator Comrie, Assemblymember Hyndman, Councilmember Williams, NYLPF, HDC, and Addisleigh Park Civic Organization to unveil new markers honoring Addisleigh Park Historic District.LPC Announces New Grant Awards and Completion of Earlier Grant-Funded WorkLearn moreLPC today announced three new grants provided through its Historic Preservation Grant Program, and announced that grant-funded restoration work is officially complete on several designated properties citywide, including three properties in Brooklyn’s Alice and Agate Courts Historic District.PreviousNextDiscover NYC LandmarksGoPermit Application FinderGoLPC Designation ReportsGoUpcoming Public HearingsApril 14, 2026Public Hearing/MeetingPublic ViewingApril 10, 2026April 7, 2026Public Hearing/MeetingPublic ViewingApril 3, 2026March 24, 2026Public Hearing/MeetingPublic ViewingMarch 20, 2026March 17, 2026Public Hearing/MeetingPublic ViewingMarch 13, 2026March 10, 2026Public Hearing
